Class GenericWorker<T>

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.SwingWorker<Void,Void>
org.key_project.slicing.util.GenericWorker<T>
Type Parameters:
T - result of running the provided task
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable, Future<Void>, RunnableFuture<Void>
public class GenericWorker<T> extends SwingWorker<Void,Void>
Generic background thread worker.

  • Constructor Details

    • GenericWorker

      public GenericWorker(Callable<T> backgroundTask, Consumer<T> callback, Consumer<Exception> callbackError)
      Create a new GenericWorker. Make sure to start it using SwingWorker.execute()! The provided callbacks will be invoked on the AWT event dispatching thread.
      Parameters:
      backgroundTask - task to execute
      callback - callback on successful execution
      callbackError - callback if task raised an exception

  • Method Details

    • doInBackground

      protected Void doInBackground() throws Exception

      doInBackground in class SwingWorker<Void,Void>
      Throws:
      Exception
